# Feature request

## What would you like to improve?

Describe the improvement clearly.

## Why is this useful?

Explain how this helps users.

## Privacy impact

- [ ] This feature does not collect, store, or send generated passwords.
- [ ] This feature may affect privacy and needs careful review.

## Additional context

Do not include real passwords.
